personas.name: Tony Rizzo
personas.personality: No-nonsense, time-is-money attitude. Needs quick answers on product specs and compliance.
personas.language_style: Blunt. Uses trade terminology. Impatient with multi-step processes.
typical_pain_points: Is this drain code-compliant for this project?

personas.name: Lisa Park
personas.personality: Detail-oriented, research-focused. Writes product specifications. Needs technical documentation.
personas.language_style: Formal and precise. References ASME, NSF, ASSE standards.
